FC-FOOTLOCKER.title: Footlocker Ammo Box
FC-FOOTLOCKER.description: The Freedom Footlocker is our largest handcrafted ammo box, built from durable 1/2-inch plywood to balance strength with reduced weight. Designed with dual removable compartments for organized storage, it offers an impressive interior capacity of 20 1/4" wide × 10" long × 8" deep. Crafted in limited quantities due to the time and material required—available occasionally as stock permits or by custom request.

FC-RB-300.title: Rangemaster 300
FC-RB-300.description:
The Rangemaster 300 is the compact sibling to our Rangemaster 400, purpose-built for pistol calibers. Crafted from durable 1/2-inch ply and finished in Freedom Crate Co.’s signature ultra-flat OD Green.

Features:
  • Black heavy-duty hardware & oversized stainless steel hinges
  • Spring-loaded folding top handle for quick grab-and-go
  • Proprietary 1-inch brown nylon webbing side handles with fail-safe recessed mount system
  • Secure over-center latch keeps the lid tight and ammo secure
  • Divider-ready interior for pistol calibers (.380, 9mm, 10mm, .45 ACP)
Compact, organized, and built to last — the Rangemaster 300 is your go-to pistol-caliber ammo crate.

FC-RB-1000.title: Freedom Crate 1000
FC-RB-1000.description:
The Freedom Crate 1000 is our most hardware-packed, heavy-duty ammo crate to date. Built for maximum durability, long-term storage, and uncompromising security, it combines rugged materials with premium stainless steel hardware for a crate that’s as functional as it is collectible.

Construction & Materials:
  • 3/4-inch UTX exterior-grade plywood with 1/4-inch plywood bottom
  • 1×2 solid pine legs for reinforced corner support
  • 1×2 solid pine lid braces for heavy-duty top reinforcement
  • 3/4-inch solid pine tongue & groove lid boards
  • 1-1/4 inch SPAX® construction screws used throughout structural joints — chosen for superior holding power, anti-racking stability, and long-term durability (a level of fastening strength rarely used in mass-produced or government-spec crates due to cost — but we use them because we want our crates to last)
Hardware & Features:
  • (2) Stainless steel 3-inch D-ring handles
  • (3) Stainless steel toggle latches with red grips
  • Massive 4-inch 304 stainless steel center padlock hasp (padlock not included) — screws are concealed beneath the hasp itself, preventing tampering or removal
  • Stainless steel tri-fold rear hinges with six mounting points (2 surface-mount, 2 edge-mount, 2 rear-panel mount) for maximum strength and security
  • (4) Stainless steel 1-inch interior corner braces
  • Low-profile build: just over 8 inches tall
  • Holds 20+ boxes of 9mm (≈1,000+ rounds) with space left for oxygen or moisture-absorbing packets
Designed for Security: Unlike standard crates where a padlock hasp can simply be unscrewed, the Freedom Crate 1000 was engineered to stop quick-access tampering. Combined with reinforced rear hinges and lockable hardware, this crate is built to safeguard your ammunition for the long haul — whether under a bed or stored in a closet.

The Freedom Crate 1000 — built for durability. Built for security. Built for freedom.

FC-RM-400.title: Rangemaster 400 Base
FC-RM-400.description:
The Rangemaster 400 is a purpose-built, portable ammo crate engineered for shooters who carry multiple calibers to the range. Built from 1/2-inch high-density plywood and finished with rugged hardware, the RM-400 is compact, highly portable, and designed to be carried by its side webbing handles longways. The base model ships without interior or exterior poly-shield coatings — choose Armor Core (interior poly shield) or Battle Guard (exterior poly shield) from the main product card for added protection and longevity.

Features:
  • Constructed from 1/2-inch high-density plywood for superior stiffness and durability
  • Spring-loaded folding top handle for quick grab-and-go carry
  • Single black toggle latch on the front for secure closure
  • Two oversized stainless-steel hinges at the rear for ultra durability
  • Proprietary 1-inch brown nylon webbing side handles designed to carry the box on its side (longways)
  • Divider-ready interior with two dividers to create three compartments
  • Interior dimensions: 9" × 4" × 4" (usable) — Exterior: 11" × 5" × 5"
  • Estimated capacity: ~400 rounds total (approx. 60 .308 / 100 .223-5.56 / 200 9mm — varies by packaging and loading)
  • Base model is uncoated; Armor Core (interior) or Battle Guard (exterior) selectable for extra protection
  • Approx. fully loaded weight: ~14 lbs (varies by loadout)
Here at Freedom Crate Co., we thrive on producing one-of-a-kind items — and just like the Freedom Crate Co. brand, all of our crates are built to last. The Rangemaster 400 makes the perfect gift for that husband who loves days on the range, that veteran buddy you respect, or the gun enthusiast in your life. When you buy the Rangemaster 400, you’re buying functional art that’s guaranteed to turn heads at the range. It’s guaranteed to get a smile out of the husband, a high-five from that veteran friend, and without a doubt, a compliment every time you bring it out to shoot.

FC-CLASSIC.title: Freedom Crate Slide-Top
FC-CLASSIC.description:
The Freedom Crate Slide-Top is the crate that started it all — the very first box ever built at Freedom Crate Co. Inspired by the original box passed down from my friend's father, this design became the foundation of our story (as shared on our About page). Simple, rugged, and dependable, it quickly grew into our number-one seller and remains a customer favorite to this day.

Essentially the Freedom Crate Branch Collection without the hardware, the Slide-Top is the purest form of our craftsmanship — clean, functional, and built to last. Featuring a smooth sliding lid with no hinges, latches, or stenciling, this design embodies minimalist durability. Each crate is built from 3/4" UTX Exterior-grade plywood with reinforced lid rails and integrated side handles for reliable strength and everyday use.

Features:
  • Heritage: The original Freedom Crate design — the very first box we ever built, inspired by a gift that sparked the entire company
  • Material: 3/4" UTX Exterior-grade plywood
  • Design: Smooth slide lid — no hinges, no latches, no stencils
  • Features: Reinforced lid rails, integrated side handles
  • Finish: Natural plywood with clean edges, ready for use
  • Use: Everyday storage, organization, or display
A timeless classic, the Slide-Top remains a great value for anyone who appreciates rugged simplicity, authentic craftsmanship, and the story of where Freedom Crate Co. began.

FC-9MM-ARMOR.title: Handcrafted 9mm Wooden Ammo Box – Military Style Storage – Armor Core
FC-9MM-ARMOR.description:
Built tough and finished with pride, this handcrafted 9mm ammo box is both functional and collectible. Designed to capture the rugged military aesthetic, it features hand-stenciled 9mm Ball M882 markings and authentic ammo crate styling. Whether you’re storing 9mm rounds, range gear, or keepsakes, this box is a durable and meaningful addition to any space.

Now enhanced with Freedom Crate Co.’s Armor Core™ Interior — a deep-penetrating epoxy treatment that seals and fortifies the inside of the box. This advanced protective layer hardens within the wood fibers, creating a rigid, moisture-resistant shell that shields against humidity, oil, and impact. Armor Core represents Freedom Crate Co.’s most durable protective system ever designed, delivering unmatched interior strength while preserving the handcrafted character of each crate.

⸻

Not Just a Box — A Piece of Functional Art

Dimensions:
• Exterior: 14” L × 11” W × 9” H
• Interior Storage Space: 11” L × 9” W × 5.5” H

Specifications:
• Material: 3/4” plywood – strong, lighter than solid wood for easier handling
• Paint Finish: Flat Olive Drab (OD Green)
• Stencils: “9mm Ball M882” caliber-specific markings, hand-applied in small batches
• Lot Number: FC-1000-B01-0928215-03 (Freedom Crate Co. production lot for authenticity & tracking)
• Handles: Steel D-Ring folding handles
• Hardware: Lockable stainless steel latches, stainless steel tri-fold hinges
• Interior: Armor Core™ epoxy-sealed compartment for maximum durability and moisture resistance

Great For: Ammo & range gear • Tactical tools • Rustic display • Gifts for gun owners, veterans, or collectors • Garage, office, or man cave storage

⸻

Handcrafted by Freedom Crate Co. — Supporting America’s Heroes. A portion of every sale helps fund The Final Salute Project, gifting custom keepsake boxes to recently retired U.S. veterans. 🇺🇸

BUILT BY: Steven Tauriello

FC-GADSDEN-1217.title: Limited Edition Gadsden Ammo Box – Bazooka Green Pine – Lot FC-1217-1775-01
FC-GADSDEN-1217.description:
Support Our American Heritage. Defend Freedom. This one-of-one Limited Edition Gadsden Ammo Box captures the defiant spirit of liberty that defined the American Revolution. The renowned “Don’t Tread on Me” emblem was first presented to the Continental Congress on December 17, 1775, by Colonel Christopher Gadsden — a symbol of unity, courage, and resistance to tyranny.

Handcrafted from solid pine and finished in weathered Bazooka Green, this Freedom Crate Co. original includes Armor Core™ PolyShield interior protection for unmatched durability, rigidity, and moisture resistance.

⸻

Features:
  • ⚒️ Pro-Tec latch catches for perfect closure alignment
  • 🔒 Lockable black toggle latches for added security
  • 🪶 1-inch brown nylon webbing handles for strength and comfort
  • 🖤 Black tri-fold hinges for ultra-durability
  • 🐍 Gadsden “Don’t Tread on Me” hand-applied emblem in bold yellow and black contrast

Specifications:
  • Interior Dimensions: 11” W × 8½” L × 5½” D
  • Material: Solid pine (not plywood)
  • Finish: Weathered Bazooka Green with Armor Core™ interior coating
  • Edition: One-of-One Limited Collector’s Piece
  • Lot No.: FC-1217-1775-01

⸻

Proudly built by Freedom Crate Co. — Supporting America’s Heroes. A portion of every sale helps fund The Final Salute Project, gifting handcrafted keepsake boxes to recently retired U.S. veterans.

BUILT BY: Steven Tauriello

FC-ZOMBIE-01.title: Freedom Crate Classic Bazooka Green Slide-Top – Handcrafted Wooden Ammo Box
FC-ZOMBIE-01.description:
This one-of-one Freedom Crate Classic Bazooka Green Prototype is a rugged, functional, and collectible wooden ammo box built to embody American craftsmanship, battlefield character, and old-school military utility. Finished in a slate-gray undercoat with ultra-flat Bazooka Green brushed over top, it delivers a weathered, zombied-out aesthetic unlike anything else we’ve made.

⸻

Features:
  • Prototype Build – One of One: The only Bazooka Green Prototype ever produced — fully unique and never to be replicated.
  • Distressed Finish: Slate-gray undertone with hand-brushed Bazooka Green for a weathered field-used appearance.
  • Black Stenciling: AMMO front stencil + vintage five-point star.
  • 1-inch Brown Nylon Webbing Handles: Lightweight, tough, and field-ready.
  • Slide-Top Lid: Classic Freedom Crate slide-lid design with raised slat rails.

Specifications:
  • Exterior: 14” L × 10” W × 7” H
  • Interior: 11” L × 8.25” W × 5.5” H
  • Material: Solid pine
  • Finish: Distressed Bazooka Green Prototype
  • Edition: One-of-One Prototype
  • Lot No.: FC-ZOMBIE-3020-01

⸻

Handcrafted by Freedom Crate Co. — Supporting America’s Heroes. A portion of every sale helps fund The Final Salute Project, gifting custom keepsake boxes to recently retired U.S. veterans. ⚒️

BUILT BY: Steven Tauriello

FC-UTILITY-V01.title: Freedom Crate Utility Series – V01 Modular Dual-Tray Storage Crate
FC-UTILITY-V01.description:
The Freedom Crate Utility Series – V01 is the first in our modular gear-storage lineup, built to organize ammo, tools, pistol accessories, and first-aid equipment with rugged reliability and real-wood craftsmanship. Featuring a dual-tray system, reinforced construction, and a mission-ready layout, this crate is designed for everyday use whether at the range, in the workshop, or on standby for emergencies.

⸻

Features:
  • Dual-Tray System: A full-width sliding tray (1" deep) and a removable main tray (2" deep) for modular organization.
  • Bottom Storage Zone: 2" deep compartment beneath the trays — perfect for boxed ammo or larger gear.
  • Heavy-Duty Toggle Latch: Front-mounted latch keeps the lid secure during transport.
  • Nylon Webbing Handles: 1" brown strap handles for lightweight durability.
  • Quality Materials: ¾" plywood walls, ¼" plywood tray panels, solid tongue-and-groove pine lid, and stainless steel hinges.

Specifications:
  • Exterior: 14” W × 10” L × 7” H
  • Interior: 11” W × 9” L × 5.5” H
  • Main Tray: 10.5” × 8” × 2”
  • Sliding Tray: Full width, 1” deep
  • Lot No.: FC-UTILITY-V01

⸻

This crate is built for those who need adaptable storage that performs. Whether used for ammo, a pistol kit, tools, first-aid gear, or emergency preparedness, the V01 sets the foundation for the entire Utility Series.

Handcrafted by Freedom Crate Co. — Supporting America’s Heroes. A portion of every sale helps fund The Final Salute Project, gifting custom keepsake boxes to recently retired U.S. veterans. ⚒️

BUILT BY: Steven Tauriello

FC-CLAYMORE-M18A1.title: Claymore Storage Crate – M18A1 Style Military Box
FC-CLAYMORE-M18A1.description:
Inspired by the iconic M18A1 Claymore mine crate, this handcrafted wooden storage box is a faithful military-style reproduction designed for storage, display, and long-term durability. Built to capture the unmistakable look of a field-issued container, it features authentic stenciling and rugged construction true to historic military packaging.

Constructed from ¾” UTX exterior-grade plywood and finished in true military Olive Drab, this crate delivers historical realism with modern durability. All edges are sealed using penetrating epoxy to help protect against moisture while preserving the classic exterior silhouette.

Features:
  • Authentic M18A1 Claymore-style military stenciling
  • Traditional slide-top lid for a period-correct look and feel
  • ¾” UTX exterior-grade plywood construction (not solid wood)
  • Penetrating epoxy edge seal for moisture resistance
  • Galvanized 3” folding steel side handles
  • Flat Olive Drab military finish
  • Handcrafted in small batches in the USA

Dimensions:
  • Interior: 11½” W × 8½” L × 5⅞” D
  • Exterior: 14½” W × 10” L × 7½” H

Great For: Ammo storage • Range gear • Tools • Man cave displays • Military collectibles • Gifts for veterans

Armor Core Upgrade Available:
This listing is for the standard (non-Armor Core) version of the Claymore crate. Customers who want this box upgraded with our Armor Core epoxy-reinforced interior lining may request it through our custom order form for an additional charge.

This crate is intended for storage, organization, or display purposes only. It is a handcrafted homage to historic military packaging and is not a functional weapon container.

Handcrafted by Freedom Crate Co. — Supporting America’s Heroes. A portion of every sale helps fund The Final Salute Project, gifting custom keepsake boxes to recently retired U.S. veterans. 🇺🇸

BUILT BY: Steven Tauriello

FC-CLAYMORE-M18A1-ARMOR.description:
Inspired by the iconic M18A1 Claymore mine crate, this handcrafted wooden storage box is a faithful military-style reproduction designed for storage, display, and long-term durability. Built to capture the unmistakable look of a field-issued container, it features authentic stenciling and rugged construction true to historic military packaging.

Constructed from ¾” UTX exterior-grade plywood and finished in true military Olive Drab, this crate delivers historical realism with enhanced modern durability. The interior is fully lined with our proprietary Armor Core™ epoxy-reinforced coating, providing added protection against moisture, oils, and wear while preserving the classic exterior silhouette. All edges are sealed using penetrating epoxy for additional moisture resistance.

Features:
  • Authentic M18A1 Claymore-style military stenciling
  • Traditional slide-top lid for a period-correct look and feel
  • ¾” UTX exterior-grade plywood construction (not solid wood)
  • Armor Core™ epoxy-reinforced interior lining
  • Penetrating epoxy edge seal for enhanced moisture resistance
  • Galvanized 3” folding steel side handles
  • Flat Olive Drab military finish
  • Handcrafted in small batches in the USA

Dimensions:
  • Interior: 11½” W × 8½” L × 5⅞” D
  • Exterior: 14½” W × 10” L × 7½” H

Great For: Ammo storage • Range gear • Tools • Man cave displays • Military collectibles • Gifts for veterans

Armor Core™ Edition:
This Armor Core Edition features a factory-applied epoxy-reinforced interior lining designed to improve durability and long-term protection while maintaining authentic military styling.

This crate is intended for storage, organization, or display purposes only. It is a handcrafted homage to historic military packaging and is not a functional weapon container.

FC-RECON.title: Mini Recon Ammo Crate
FC-RECON.description:
Compact, field-ready, and engineered for organized split-load storage, the Mini Recon Ammo Crate is a purpose-built dual-compartment system designed for controlled transport and bench-ready access. Built the Freedom Crate way, it features a removable divider, slide-top field lid, and our signature one-inch nylon webbing carry handles — all handcrafted for durability and long-term use.

Finished in Freedom Crate Co.’s military Olive Drab and built with rugged handmade construction, the Mini Recon is designed for shooters who want compact storage without sacrificing structure or function. The interior is fully lined with our proprietary Armor Core™ reinforced coating, providing added protection against moisture, oils, and wear while preserving the crate’s clean, tactical silhouette.

Features:
  • Dual-compartment design with removable divider (convertible to one open cavity)
  • Traditional slide-top lid for quick field-style access
  • Armor Core™ reinforced interior lining for long-term durability
  • One-inch nylon webbing carry handles (Freedom Crate Co. design)
  • Handcrafted wood construction with compact footprint for shelf or bench storage

Dimensions:
  • Exterior: 11.5” W × 8” L × 5.25” H
  • Internal Compartments (each): 5” H × 4 1/8” W × 6.5” L
  • Approx. 134 cubic inches per compartment
  • Approx. 268 cubic inches total capacity

Approximate Capacity:
  • Each compartment holds approximately 250+ rounds of .223 / 5.56
  • Each compartment holds approximately 400–500 rounds of 9mm
  • Capacity varies depending on packing method.

Armor Core™ Interior:
Every Mini Recon crate is coated with our proprietary Armor Core™ interior lining system, providing a hardened, reinforced surface engineered for long-term durability.

See How It’s Built:
Want to see how a Freedom Crate is made? To view our build process, shop footage, and the making of each crate, visit FreedomCrateCo.com on YouTube. If you’d like to explore the engineering philosophy and design behind our crates — including materials, reinforcement methods, and Armor Core™ development — you can also visit FreedomCrateCo.com. We believe in transparency. We show our process.

This crate is intended for storage, organization, or display purposes only. Ammunition not included.

Handcrafted in the USA by Freedom Crate Co. — Supporting America’s Heroes. A portion of every sale helps fund The Final Salute Project, gifting handcrafted keepsake boxes to retiring veterans. 🇺🇸

BUILT BY: Steven Tauriello
